evals.prompt: Audit the RLS policies in supabase/migrations/20240315_rls_policies.sql — check if division isolation is airtight and flag any tables that might be missing policies
evals.expected_output: Structured audit report covering each table's RLS status, identifying any gaps in division_id filtering, checking for proper use of get_user_division_id(), and flagging any missing policies on junction tables

assertions.description: Output follows severity-classified report format (Critical/High/Medium/Low findings)
Lists all tables that have or should have RLS policies
Specifically examines division_id filtering in RLS policies
Identifies any tables without RLS that should have it

evals.prompt: Review src/lib/actions/divisions.ts and src/lib/actions/users.ts for permission enforcement — are there any server actions that skip authorization checks?
evals.expected_output: Detailed findings on each server action function, whether it validates permissions server-side before executing, identifies any actions that rely solely on UI hiding, checks for privilege escalation paths

assertions.description: Output follows severity-classified report format (Critical/High/Medium/Low findings)
Analyzes each exported server action function individually
Distinguishes between UI-only checks vs server-side enforcement
Flags any privilege escalation paths in role/permission management
Validates that role scope boundaries are respected

evals.prompt: Audit the sequence counter and approval workflow code for race conditions — check supabase/migrations/20240309_sequence_counters.sql, 20240311_approval_logs.sql, and 20240314_triggers.sql
evals.expected_output: Analysis of atomicity in sequence generation, idempotency of approval operations, proper locking mechanisms, and whether concurrent operations could corrupt state

assertions.description: Output follows severity-classified report format (Critical/High/Medium/Low findings)
Analyzes whether sequence generation uses proper locking (SELECT FOR UPDATE or equivalent)
Evaluates if approval operations handle double-submission safely
Flags specific concurrent scenarios that could corrupt state
Suggests SELECT FOR UPDATE, transactions, or equivalent mechanisms
